hypotheses.name: TRRUST co-pole x 12 layers + Activation/Repression stratification
hypotheses.method: For each of 12 layers, SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embedding. SV2 top-K=52 / bottom-K=52 poles. Compute co-pole rate for 333 all TRRUST pairs, 116 activation pairs, 64 repression pairs. Empirical null N=500 gene-label shuffles per layer. 1-sided emp_p.
hypotheses.result_value: All 12 layers p<0.05 (peak L4: emp_p=0.000, obs=0.234 vs null=0.130). Activation: 12/12 layers p<0.05. Repression: 1/12 layers p<0.05 (L4 only).
hypotheses.next_action: Test activation vs repression difference significance (e.g., bootstrap test of act_copole > rep_copole). Also test STRING PPI pairs for convergent evidence.

hypotheses.name: SV2 mito pole-flip gene tracking at L3-to-L4 transition
hypotheses.method: Compute SV2 raw projection sign for 14 mito genes (GO:0005739) at each of 12 layers. Track sign-flip events. Characterize flip vs stable gene sets. Check flip-gene GO annotations.
hypotheses.result_value: 0 flips at L3->L4. 12/14 genes flip at L0->L1 then stable bottom-pole. 2/14 stable top. HIF3A flips at layers 0, 8, 10.
hypotheses.next_action: Reframe: investigate HIF3A as multi-flip outlier. Examine rank-based pole assignment (not raw sign) to reconcile with iter_0010 compartment OR direction shift. Mito genes are stably bottom-pole from L1+.

hypotheses.name: GO Biological Process enrichment in SV2 poles (broad functional screen)
hypotheses.method: 591 GO terms with 3-50 named genes. For layers 7, 8, 11: SV2 poles (top-K=52, bottom-K=52). Fisher exact OR per term, best pole. Empirical null N=200 gene-label shuffles.
hypotheses.result_value: 0/591 significant terms at any of 3 layers. Top hit: GO:0007417 OR=3.1, emp_p=1.0
hypotheses.next_action: Retire GO BP -> SV2 enrichment. SV2 encodes CC compartments but not BP programs. Redirect to STRING PPI co-pole or multi-layer activation analysis.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: 0/591 BP terms significant after null correction at 3 layers; direction is negative
